title: melicope glabra
intro: Melicope glabra, also known as Smooth-leaved Melicope, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in Hawaii and other Pacific Island nations. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Melicope glabra include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Melicope glabra typically involve making tea or infusions from the leaves and roots, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
